# Newsroom
[ ![Riverlane publishes QEC Technology Roadmap that can accelerate quantum computing’s path to utility scale by 3–5 years](https://www.riverlane.com/media/ru2hfhaa/df-cta-image-2.png?rmode=max&width=800&quality=80&v=1dcb16be03ec7a0) ](https://www.riverlane.com/press-release/riverlane-publishes-qec-technology-roadmap)
Press release
## Riverlane publishes QEC Technology Roadmap that can accelerate quantum computing’s path to utility scale by 3–5 years
12 March 2026
The roadmap defines the key science and engineering milestones to scale quantum computers from today’s experimental machines to systems capable of solving commercially valuable problems
[Read more](https://www.riverlane.com/press-release/riverlane-publishes-qec-technology-roadmap "Riverlane publishes QEC Technology Roadmap that can accelerate quantum computing’s path to utility scale by 3–5 years")

Blog
Press releases
